title: Correct registers and measurement in OpenQASM 2
prompt: Write an OpenQASM 2.0 program that declares the correct quantum and classical registers, applies a couple of gates, and measures each qubit into a valid classical bit (no out-of-range indices, no undeclared registers).
expected_features: declared qreg and creg of matching size
gates using only declared, in-range indices
notes: Targets the exact structural mistakes qcheck v0 catches: undeclared registers, out-of-range indices, malformed measurements. This is where static checking is strongest.
